info.name: DynDisc2-MultiContract-AR-AP-CashReserve-fix3
info.description:
Dynamic Discounting 2: AR/AP multi-contract with dynamic cash reserve.
FIX-3 changes vs fix2:
  1. CSH init pre-request initialises arLedger, apLedger and all total accumulators.
  2. Each AR post-request appends to arLedger and accumulates arTotalInflow / arSavingsTotal.
  3. Each AP pre-request refreshes CASH_RESERVE_01 via pm.sendRequest (no separate refresh request needed);
     post-request computes payoff client-side, appends to apLedger, accumulates apTotalOutflow / apSavingsTotal.
  4. Dashboard post-request reads all six collectionVariables correctly and prints full ledger + summary.

item.name: CSH CASH-RESERVE-001 – init $1 000 + reset all ledger vars

exec: // ── FIX-3 ── Initialise ALL collection-variable state so the
// dashboard can read it back correctly at the end.
console.log('Phase 4: CSH – Opening Cash Reserve $' + OPENING.toFixed(2));
console.log('  All ledger accumulators reset to zero.');
// ── FIX-3 ── AR post-request: append to arLedger, accumulate totals.
// Append entry to AR ledger array
console.log('SETTLED ' + contractID + ': payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=$' + saving.toFixed(2));
console.log('SETTLED ' + contractID + ': payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=$' + saving.toFixed(2));
console.log('SETTLED ' + contractID + ': payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=$' + saving.toFixed(2));
console.log('SETTLED ' + contractID + ': payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=$' + saving.toFixed(2));
console.log('SETTLED ' + contractID + ': payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=$' + saving.toFixed(2));
// ── FIX-3 ── AP pre-request: compute payoff client-side (RPL PP=0 engine limitation)
// then refresh CASH_RESERVE_01 via pm.sendRequest before the simulation runs.
// Refresh CASH_RESERVE_01 flat timeseries to current balance
data: dates.map(t => ({ time: t, value: cashReserve }))
else console.log('  CASH_RESERVE_01 refreshed to $' + cashReserve.toFixed(2) + ' HTTP ' + res.code);
// ── FIX-3 ── AP post-request: use client-side payoff (engine PP=0 for RPL),
// deduct from cashReserve, append to apLedger, accumulate totals.
console.log('PAID ' + contractID + ': payoff=-$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=+$' + saving.toFixed(2) + ' -> cashReserve=$' + cashReserve.toFixed(2));
console.log('  [RPL corrected: IED=+' + notional + '  PP=-' + payoff.toFixed(2) + '  MD=0.00  (engine PP=0  engine MD=-' + notional + ')]');
data: dates.map(t => ({ time: t, value: cashReserve }))
else console.log('  CASH_RESERVE_01 refreshed to $' + cashReserve.toFixed(2) + ' HTTP ' + res.code);
console.log('PAID ' + contractID + ': payoff=-$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=+$' + saving.toFixed(2) + ' -> cashReserve=$' + cashReserve.toFixed(2));
data: dates.map(t => ({ time: t, value: cashReserve }))
else console.log('  CASH_RESERVE_01 refreshed to $' + cashReserve.toFixed(2) + ' HTTP ' + res.code);
console.log('PAID ' + contractID + ': payoff=-$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=+$' + saving.toFixed(2) + ' -> cashReserve=$' + cashReserve.toFixed(2));
data: dates.map(t => ({ time: t, value: cashReserve }))
else console.log('  CASH_RESERVE_01 refreshed to $' + cashReserve.toFixed(2) + ' HTTP ' + res.code);
console.log('PAID ' + contractID + ': payoff=-$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=+$' + saving.toFixed(2) + ' -> cashReserve=$' + cashReserve.toFixed(2));
data: dates.map(t => ({ time: t, value: cashReserve }))
else console.log('  CASH_RESERVE_01 refreshed to $' + cashReserve.toFixed(2) + ' HTTP ' + res.code);
console.log('PAID ' + contractID + ': payoff=-$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=+$' + saving.toFixed(2) + ' -> cashReserve=$' + cashReserve.toFixed(2));
// ── FIX-3 ── Dashboard: reads all six ledger collectionVariables correctly.
// In fix2 these arrays were never written so the dashboard printed zeros.
console.log('DYNDISC-2  |  AR/AP Multi-Contract + Dynamic Cash Reserve  [fix3]');
console.log('  ── AR Settlement Ledger (' + arLedger.length + ' contracts) ──');
console.log('  ── AP Settlement Ledger (' + apLedger.length + ' contracts) ──');
console.log('  Total AR inflows  : +$' + arTotal.toFixed(2) + '  (' + arLedger.length + ' contracts)');
console.log('  Total AP outflows :  $' + apTotal.toFixed(2) + '  (' + apLedger.length + ' contracts)');
console.log('  AR supplier savings  : $' + arSavings.toFixed(2) + '  (suppliers received less than face)');
console.log('  AP OurCo savings     : $' + apSavings.toFixed(2) + '  (OurCo paid less than face)');
console.log('  ENGINE NOTE: ACTUS RPL role returns PP.payoff=0 (known engine limitation).');
console.log('  CORRECT RPL cash flows: IED=+notional  PP=-discountedAmt  MD=0.');
console.log('  AP amounts computed client-side via LINEAR formula in pre-request scripts.');
// Assertions so Postman marks the run green/red
